metadata.description: Subset of 10 travel requests for RQ2 experiments, stratified by density and covering all constraint categories, resolvability levels, and importance levels via their gold annotations.

requests.request: Book a flight for one adult from Stuttgart to Berlin for tomorrow at 3 PM.
I need a hotel in Bangalore near Manyata Tech Park for next weekend.
Book a rental car at Munich airport this Friday for the full day.
I want to visit my parents in Karol Bagh over Christmas, need a hotel cheaper than 30 EUR per night.
Get me on the next available train from Stuttgart to Zurich.
Book me an economy flight from Delhi to Rome sometime next week that is reasonably priced and does not involve too many layovers.
Book a train from Hamburg to Copenhagen leaving early tomorrow.

Find me a good hotel in Copenhagen within 5 kms from station which serves vegetarian meals April 15th onwards. If the per night cost is less than 30 euros per room book it for 3 nights, else book for 2 nights.
I live in Frankfurt. Get me to Bangalore by end of week, preferably morning flight. I may need to reschedule.
Get a late economy class evening flight for one adult from the nearest airport of Ulm to Frankfurt.
